prompt: A vertical mobile wallpaper, digital collage style, magazine editorial. A young female K-pop idol posing facing the camera, showcasing stylish clothing details. Detailed stripes on her off-shoulder knitwear, edgy platform leather boots. Trendy cool-toned color palette (silver, charcoal, deep black). White cutout border around the character. Upper: clean July 2026 calendar typography. Lower: desaturated urban street background. Lower right: layered Polaroid overlay with "Happy Birthday" handwritten script. Cinematic lighting, muted moody tones, film grain, artistic fashion spread, ultra-detailed --ar 4:5

promptZh: 竖版手机壁纸，数字拼贴风格，杂志编辑排版。一位年轻的 女性 K-pop 偶像 正面面对镜头，展示时尚穿搭细节。她穿着的 露肩针织衫 上有精致的条纹，搭配前卫的厚底皮靴。潮流冷色调配色（银色、炭灰色、深黑色）。人物周围有白色剪纸边框。上方：简洁的 2026 年 7 月 日历排版。下方：低饱和度的城市街道背景。右下角：带有“Happy Birthday”手写字体的叠层拍立得效果。电影级光影，柔和的情绪色调，胶片颗粒感，艺术时尚大片，超高细节 --ar 4:5
